name: Platinum - Behind Their Lives
overview: Hayeon spots a manager of the One Percenters' secret social club Platinum impersonating her name. She secretly joins the club for investigation and meets Taejun there. Minho runs into Hayeon while investigating a case in the club, and starts digging up the club's wirepuller, Jina. Amidst a risky entanglement with each other, their secrets are revealed. Who will be the winner of this game?

trailers.title: 나를 사칭한 비밀클럽의 운영자 파헤치기, 삼각관계는 내 작전에 없었는데.. [플래티넘-그들이 사는 세상] 1-9화 몰아보기
